N_532_DVR_201912101724

OBD Information

Protocol: CAN
Send ID: 788
Recv ID: 7A8
Baudrate: 10400
Func Addr: 47
Func Name: SR

Auto IDents

[
  {
    "diagversion": "2",
    "supplier": "111111",
    "soft": "1R6DCXE0IEMQ2LBN",
    "version": "49Y4K2G3JMU"
  }
]

Devices

[
  {
    "dtc": 49267,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[U0073]CAN BusOff error"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53248,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[U1000]CAN Communication Fault"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 53264,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[U1010]CONTROL UNIT(CAN)"
  },
  {
    "dtc": 61446,
    "dtctype": 0,
    "devicedata": {},
    "name": "[U3006]Control Module Input Power Low"
  }
]
